documentation.file_docstring: Cron session reaper — prunes completed isolated cron run sessions from the session store after a configurable retention period. Pattern: sessions keyed as `...:cron:<jobId>:run:<uuid>` are ephemeral run records. The base session (`...:cron:<jobId>`) is kept as-is.
inline_comments: Sweep the session store and prune expired cron run sessions. Designed to be called from the cron timer tick — self-throttles via MIN_SWEEP_INTERVAL_MS to avoid excessive I/O. Lock ordering: this function acquires the session-store file lock via `updateSessionStore`. It must be called OUTSIDE of the cron service's own `locked()` section to avoid lock-order inversions. The cron timer calls this after all `locked()` sections have been released.

functions.name: sweepCronRunSessions
functions.doc: Sweep the session store and prune expired cron run sessions.   Designed to be called from the cron timer tick — self-thr
